name: RPlog_talk_The_Nar_Shaddaa_Space_Battle
title: Talk: The Nar Shaddaa Space Battle -- Deletion Proposal
summary: This brief out-of-character wiki talk page contains a single deletion proposal for the log. Under a 'Deletion' heading, the editor SW1 Kyle notes that a better version of the same events already exists at the RPlog 'Revolutions End' and suggests that this duplicate article should probably be deleted. No further discussion follows.
